payload.label: rug
payload.long_description: Partial edge-cropped rectangular woven rug with a muted blue, beige, tan and cream abstract wavy/floral pattern and narrow reddish-brown binding visible against a hardwood floor; appears to be a low-pile or flatweave on the floor about 1.0 m from the camera.
